reviews.review_description:
i thought this would be fun
..its boring as heck....dev respond s "Today
This app is not for everybody, people with certain taste will find it very pleasant". who? my great-grandfather or grandma dont olay games...they are dead... kinda how this game made me feel.... now I see why you only have two reviews I'm sure the first guy is a friend of yours but this game stunk I'm glad I didn't spend 10 bucks on it it was only five but I'm still not happy with losing five dollars

developer_response.body: This app is not for everybody, people with certain taste will find it very pleasant. 👽👍
